description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named C/C++ CI that runs on push to the master branch and on pull requests to master. The workflow has two jobs: coverage running on a self-hosted environment and build running on ubuntu-latest. The coverage job checks out the repository, updates apt, runs autogen.sh, configures with code coverage and debug flags, runs make and make check, and uploads coverage data to Coveralls. The build job checks out the repository, updates apt, installs required packages, runs autogen.sh, configures, runs make and make distcheck, and uploads a Linux 64-bit build artifact.
